subcodes.first_line: From the rustling of the morning breeze in this Most Great Revelation, these blessed words are heard: "The world through love and fellowship..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از هزیز نسیم سحری در اینظهور اعظم اینکلمه مبارکه اصغا میشود عالم بمحبت و وداد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity of thought and belief, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
